value: Use the tw-requirements-review skill for requirements or planning authority review.
Use the tw-grill skill after ideation and before brainstorming when one selected idea needs deeper interview; its output is source evidence, not authority.
Use the tw-authority-gate skill before implementation starts on meaningful behavior.
Use the tw-traceability-check skill during plan, code, document, or release-evidence review.
Use the tw-auto skill for advisory controlled autonomy; it preserves the CE-style loop while adding authority, traceability, verification, validation, and dark-behavior controls.
The packaged lfg name delegates to tw-auto and must stop before commit, push, or PR creation in this alpha.
Use the tw-requirements-review skill for requirements or planning authority review.
Use the tw-grill skill after ideation and before brainstorming when one selected idea needs deeper interview; its output is source evidence, not authority.
Use the tw-authority-gate skill before implementation starts on meaningful behavior.
Use the tw-traceability-check skill during plan, code, document, or release-evidence review.
Use the tw-auto skill for advisory controlled autonomy; it preserves the CE-style loop while adding authority, traceability, verification, validation, and dark-behavior controls.
The packaged lfg name delegates to tw-auto and must stop before commit, push, or PR creation in this alpha.

authority_evidence.validation_question: Does this surface preserve the approved TraceWeaver authority chain without promoting held runtime, release, publication, host-removal, or clean-replacement claims?

current_core.class_rationale: Current packaged intent-deepening surface remains candidate source evidence only until reviewed authority promotes its output.
current_core.disconfirming_test: Any attempt to treat tw-grill output as implementation authority without requirements review must keep the row held.
current_core.close_condition: reviewed promotion evidence proves tw-grill authority boundaries

authority_evidence.validation_question: Does this surface preserve the approved TraceWeaver authority chain without promoting held runtime, release, publication, host-removal, or clean-replacement claims?

current_core.class_rationale: Brainstorming can feed TraceWeaver source evidence, but its outputs are not authority until routed through requirements review.
current_core.disconfirming_test: If brainstorm output can bypass requirements-quality review or baseline promotion, this row must remain held.
current_core.close_condition: reviewed wrapper evidence proves source-evidence routing and stop behavior
